task: Look for the largest hunting land for auction in Kansas high plain region with mineral rights posted in the last seven days.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the search on LandWatch with the relevant constraints: Kansas High Plains region, hunting land, auction, mineral rights, and posted in the last 7 days. Crucially, the on-site Date Listed = Past 7 days filter produced an explicit result state of “No Listings” on the High Plains hunting-auctions page, which satisfies the task as a valid 'not found' outcome. The agent also inspected the 4 unfiltered auction listings and verified acreage and mineral-rights language, confirming that although the largest was 478 acres in Comanche County, none were posted within the last 7 days. This is a thorough and evidence-backed completion.
final_result_response:
I found **no qualifying LandWatch listing**.

What I verified:
- LandWatch’s filters for **Kansas → High Plains Region → Hunting Land → Auction → Date Listed: Past 7 days** returned **“No Listings.”**
- The 4 unfiltered auction results were:
  - **478 acres, Coldwater, Comanche County**, posted **2026-03-27**, last updated May 8, includes mineral-rights transfer language. <citation refs="fetch_call_dJybWcO74qHEfmuHz0izH9H1|fc_0c0a46b404afbaaf016a050158fea08198af202a85f0b44d1f#1">LandWatch lists the 478-acre Coldwater auction, says “Mineral Rights: Seller's interest transfers to Buyer,” and shows “Listing last updated: May 8, 2026.”</citation>
  - **319 acres, Coldwater**, posted **2026-03-27**, mineral rights transfer. <citation refs="fetch_call_sI8YkoiFp1qDMfc2faldUmLg|fc_0c0a46b404afbaaf016a050158feb4819894929839799c94dc#1">LandWatch lists 319 acres and states all seller mineral-rights interest transfers at closing.</citation>
  - **159 acres, Coldwater**, posted **2026-03-27**, mineral rights transfer. <citation refs="fetch_call_ZfKJGxWYPtrFMTs5EuEPlO19|fc_0c0a46b404afbaaf016a050158febc819892160c684f11af24#1">LandWatch lists 159 acres and states all seller mineral-rights interest transfers at closing.</citation>
  - **157.38 acres, Hill City**, posted **2026-05-01**, mineral interest is retained by sellers for 10 years in 2 inactive wells. <citation refs="fetch_call_W4DPbAoXuuWsNtb7V0Keu5om|fc_0c0a46b404afbaaf016a050158feb0819883fa5179f5f8136d#1">LandWatch lists 157.38 acres and says sellers retain mineral interest in 2 inactive oil wells for 10 years.</citation>

Since today is **May 13, 2026**, the last-7-days window is **May 6–13**. None of the 4 auction listings were posted in that window. The largest overall is the **478-acre Coldwater listing**, but it does **not** meet the posted-within-last-7-days requirement.
action_history: Opening LandWatch: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.landwatch.com/');
Opening High Plains hunting auctions: await openTab('https://www.landwatch.com/kansas-land-for-sale/high-plains-region/hunting-property/auctions');
Applying mineral rights filter: await page.locator('e64').click();
Applying date listed filter to base search: await openTab('https://www.landwatch.com/kansas-land-for-sale/high-plains-region/hunting-property/auctions');
Opening largest current auction listing details: await openTab('https://www.landwatch.com/kansas-land-for-sale/high-plains-region/hunting-property/auctions');
Opening largest current auction listing details: await page.locator('e83').click();
